# AssetQuery.DecodableOnly property

FR-C20 Q2 — yield only assets that actually decode, dropping malformed/sentinel blobs (e.g. the "Bad Data" board). Cost: a decode per asset — for typed retrieval prefer [`Find`](../Catalog/Find.md), which is decodable-only by construction.

```csharp
public bool DecodableOnly { get; set; }
```
